sherlock.description: The transient is possibly associated with SDSSJ095918.75+034300.3; a W1=15.37 mag galaxy found in the LASR catalogue. Its located 46.72" S, 80.14" E (24.2 Kpc) from the galaxy centre. A host z=0.013 implies a m - M = 33.71.

TNS.reporters: I. P?rez-Fournon (IAC and ULL), M. Quintana-Ansaldo, I. Correa-Plasencia, D...
TNS.name: 2026jtd
